SandboxGateway._WorkspacePath_comment: Optional: set to ANY absolute folder to use it as the sandbox workspace (auto-created if missing). When non-empty it overrides WorkspaceBasePath+Workspace. Only applied when the app SPAWNS the gateway (stop any gateway already on :3000 first). Example: B:\\sources\\my-repo

Auth._comment: Client ids/secret are the first-party values shipped by the GitHub CLI (gh) and the azure-devops-mcp public client — reused so you can sign in with a browser without registering your own apps. Replace with your own app registration if you prefer.

Github._comment: GitHub CLI (gh) first-party OAuth App id + secret (internal/authflow/flow.go, annotated 'safe to be embedded in version control'). Browser authorization-code (loopback) flow; GitHub requires the secret in the code->token exchange even with PKCE. OAuth-App tokens are long-lived (no refresh token).

Ado._comment: azure-devops-mcp public client id (src/auth.ts). Authority 'common'; MSAL.NET interactive (browser + loopback + PKCE), no secret. Scope is the Azure DevOps resource .default.

M365._comment: EmailMcpServer Entra app (mcqdb tenant). Confidential web client; ClientSecret MUST come from user-secrets/env (Auth__M365__ClientSecret) — NEVER commit it. Multi-tenant, but pinned to the registration tenant here so token caching is per-tenant. Callback is hosted on the app's primary port at /auth/m365/callback.
